properties.description: Primary key identifier for risk model metadata records.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Auto-incremented, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: Unique identifier for each risk model definition record in the metadata system.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT

properties.description: Risk model identifier (compliance, attrition).
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Cannot be null, Must be one of: 'compliance', 'attrition'
properties.business_description: Stable identifier for the risk scoring model. Used to filter factors, bands, and rules for a specific model.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values (compliance, attrition), Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code to get model-specific metadata
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by model_code, GROUP BY model_code

properties.description: Human-readable description of the risk model.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should provide clear explanation of the model purpose
properties.business_description: Textual description explaining what the risk model calculates and its business purpose.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure description is meaningful and not empty when populated
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code

properties.description: Formula used to compute risk from impact and likelihood scores.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Default is 'sqrt(impact_score * likelihood_score)'
properties.business_description: Mathematical formula defining how impact and likelihood scores are combined to produce the final risk score.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate formula syntax, Ensure formula references valid score dimensions
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code

properties.description: Minimum score value in the model scale.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Typically 0.0
properties.business_description: Lower bound of the risk score scale for this model.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate that score_min < score_max, Typically should be 0.0
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code

properties.description: Maximum score value in the model scale.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Typically 100.0
properties.business_description: Upper bound of the risk score scale for this model.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate that score_max > score_min, Typically should be 100.0
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code

properties.description: Timestamp when the metadata record was created.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Auto-populated on insert
properties.business_description: Audit timestamp tracking when the model metadata was first created.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate timestamp format, Check for future dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by model_code

properties.description: Defines CSOD risk models used for ComplianceRisk and AttritionRisk scoring. Registry of risk scoring models (compliance, attrition) with their formulas and score ranges.
properties.business_purpose: Central registry of risk scoring models. Use model_code to filter factors, bands, and rules for a specific model. Default formula is sqrt(impact_score * likelihood_score).
properties.data_lineage: Manually maintained metadata table seeded by create_csod_risk_scoring_metadata_tables.sql migration script.

properties.description: Primary key identifier for risk score band metadata records.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Auto-incremented, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: Unique identifier for each risk score band definition.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by band_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT

properties.description: Risk model identifier (compliance, attrition).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must reference valid model_code from csod_risk_model_metadata
properties.business_description: Links the score band to a specific risk model.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate foreign key relationship with csod_risk_model_metadata, Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code to get model-specific bands
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by model_code, GROUP BY model_code

properties.description: Risk category label (Low, Moderate, High, Critical).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be one of: 'Low', 'Moderate', 'High', 'Critical'
properties.business_description: Categorical risk level used for business-friendly reporting and escalation workflows.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by band_code, Filter by model_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by band_code, GROUP BY band_code

properties.description: Inclusive lower bound for the risk score band.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be < max_score
properties.business_description: Lower threshold (inclusive) for assigning risk scores to this category band.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure min_score < max_score, Check for gaps/overlaps between bands
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by band_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MIN, MAX

properties.description: Upper bound (exclusive) for the risk score band.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be <= 100, Must be > min_score
properties.business_description: Upper threshold (typically exclusive) for assigning risk scores to this category band.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure max_score > min_score, Check for gaps/overlaps between bands
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by band_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MIN, MAX

properties.description: Severity ordering where 1 = highest severity (Critical).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Lower number = higher severity
properties.business_description: Numeric ordering for severity levels, used for sorting and prioritization in reports.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate uniqueness within model_code, Ensure 1 = Critical, 4 = Low
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by priority_order
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MIN, MAX, ORDER BY priority_order

properties.description: Human-readable description of the risk band.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should explain the band's meaning
properties.business_description: Textual description explaining what risk scores fall into this band and their business implications.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure description is meaningful when populated
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by band_code

properties.description: Timestamp when the metadata record was created.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Auto-populated on insert
properties.business_description: Audit timestamp tracking when the band metadata was first created.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate timestamp format, Check for future dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by model_code

properties.description: Defines riskCategory thresholds (Low/Moderate/High/Critical) per model. Maps numeric risk scores to categorical risk bands for business-friendly reporting.
properties.business_purpose: Enables categorization of numeric risk scores into business-friendly categories. Thresholds: Critical (75-100), High (50-75), Moderate (25-50), Low (0-25). Used by reporting dashboards and escalation workflows.
properties.data_lineage: Manually maintained metadata table seeded by create_csod_risk_scoring_metadata_tables.sql migration script.

properties.description: Primary key identifier for risk factor metadata records.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Auto-incremented, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: Unique identifier for each scoring factor definition.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by dimension, Filter by factor_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT

properties.description: Risk model identifier (compliance, attrition).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must reference valid model_code from csod_risk_model_metadata
properties.business_description: Links the factor to a specific risk model.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate foreign key relationship with csod_risk_model_metadata, Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code to get model-specific factors
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by model_code, GROUP BY model_code

properties.description: Scoring dimension (impact, likelihood).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be one of: 'impact', 'likelihood'
properties.business_description: Indicates whether this factor contributes to impact (severity) or likelihood (probability) of the risk event.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values (impact, likelihood), Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by dimension, Filter by model_code and dimension
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by dimension, GROUP BY dimension

properties.description: Stable factor identifier used by the scoring pipeline.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be unique within (model_code, dimension)
properties.business_description: Stable identifier used by transform functions to reference this factor. Used to join with lookup_metadata or bucket_metadata tables.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate uniqueness within (model_code, dimension), Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by factor_code, Filter by model_code and dimension
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by factor_code, GROUP BY factor_code

properties.description: Human-readable name for the factor.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Should be descriptive
properties.business_description: Display name used in reports and dashboards to identify this scoring factor.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure name is meaningful and not empty
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by dimension

properties.description: What the factor represents and why it matters for risk scoring.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should explain the factor's role in risk calculation
properties.business_description: Detailed explanation of what this factor measures and how it contributes to risk assessment.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure description is meaningful when populated
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by dimension

properties.description: Documentation-only: tables providing this factor's input data.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Comma-separated list of table names
properties.business_description: Reference documentation indicating which source tables contain the raw data needed to calculate this factor's score.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate table names exist in schema, Check format (comma-separated)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by dimension

properties.description: Documentation-only: columns providing this factor's input data.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Comma-separated list of column names
properties.business_description: Reference documentation indicating which source columns contain the raw data needed to calculate this factor's score.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate column names exist in referenced tables, Check format (comma-separated)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by dimension

properties.description: How to score this factor (lookup, bucket, linear, rule).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be one of: 'lookup', 'bucket', 'linear', 'rule'
properties.business_description: Determines which metadata table to use: 'lookup' -> csod_risk_factor_lookup_metadata, 'bucket' -> csod_risk_factor_bucket_metadata.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by scoring_type, Filter by model_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by scoring_type, GROUP BY scoring_type

properties.description: Fallback score used when the input is null or unmapped.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should be between 0 and 100 if provided
properties.business_description: Default numeric score assigned when source data is missing or doesn't match any lookup/bucket mapping.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100 if not null
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by dimension

properties.description: Relative weight of this factor within the model+dimension combination.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be > 0, Weights within (model_code, dimension) should sum to approximately 1.0
properties.business_description: Relative importance of this factor when calculating the weighted average for impact or likelihood scores. Higher weight = greater influence on final score.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate weight > 0, Check that weights within (model_code, dimension) sum to ~1.0
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by dimension, Filter by weight ranges
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM by (model_code, dimension), AVG, MAX, MIN

properties.description: Whether the factor is currently active in scoring calculations.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Default is TRUE, Only active factors should be used in calculations
properties.business_description: Flag indicating whether this factor should be included in risk score calculations. Inactive factors are excluded but retained for historical reference.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Ensure only active factors are used in production
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by is_active=TRUE for production use, Filter by model_code and is_active
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by is_active, COUNT where is_active=TRUE

properties.description: Timestamp when the metadata record was created.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Auto-populated on insert
properties.business_description: Audit timestamp tracking when the factor metadata was first created.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate timestamp format, Check for future dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by model_code

properties.description: Declares the set of factors (and weights) that contribute to impact and likelihood for each CSOD risk model. Compliance likelihood factors include: days_until_due, completion_percentage, course_completion_status (lookup from Transcript_csod.trainingStatus), days_since_last_activity_start (bucket from attemptStartDate), user_completion_rate, last_login_days, previous_attempts, days_since_assigned, division_completion_rate (from ComplianceRisk_Division.completionRate), division_overdue_rate (derived from ComplianceRisk_Division), division_avg_days_to_complete. Attrition likelihood factors include: tenure_risk_band, learning_engagement, compliance_completion_rate, course_completion_rate (derived from Transcript_csod), completion_percentage, days_since_last_activity_start, last_login_days, overdue_course_count, manager_change_count, division_completion_rate, division_overdue_rate. Use scoring_type='lookup' for categorical factors, 'bucket' for numeric ranges.
properties.business_purpose: Central registry of all scoring factors with their weights, source columns, and scoring methods. Transform functions should query this table to discover available factors for a model+dimension, then join with lookup_metadata or bucket_metadata based on scoring_type.
properties.data_lineage: Manually maintained metadata table seeded by create_csod_risk_scoring_metadata_tables.sql migration script.

properties.business_description: Indicates whether this lookup applies to impact or likelihood scoring.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values (impact, likelihood), Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by dimension, Filter by model_code and dimension
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by dimension, GROUP BY dimension

properties.description: Factor identifier matching csod_risk_factor_metadata.factor_code.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must reference valid factor_code from csod_risk_factor_metadata where scoring_type='lookup'
properties.business_description: Links this lookup mapping to a specific scoring factor.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate foreign key relationship with csod_risk_factor_metadata, Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by factor_code, Filter by model_code and dimension
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by factor_code, GROUP BY factor_code

properties.description: Raw categorical value from source data (e.g., 'Executive', 'Compliance', 'Completed').
properties.common_patterns: Completed, In Progress, Assigned, Overdue, Executive, Senior Management
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be unique within (model_code, dimension, factor_code)
properties.business_description: Exact categorical value from source data that maps to the numeric score. Case-sensitive matching is typically used.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate uniqueness within (model_code, dimension, factor_code), Check for null values, Validate against source data values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by input_value, Filter by factor_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by input_value, GROUP BY input_value

properties.description: Mapped numeric score (0-100) for this input value.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Numeric score assigned when source data matches this input_value. Used in weighted factor calculations.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by score ranges, Filter by factor_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVG, MIN, MAX, PERCENTILE

properties.description: Ordering for tie-breaks or preferred match when multiple mappings could apply.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Lower number = higher priority
properties.business_description: Numeric ordering used when multiple lookup entries could match. Lower priority_order values are preferred.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate uniqueness within (model_code, dimension, factor_code) if used for tie-breaking
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by factor_code, Filter by priority_order
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MIN, MAX, ORDER BY priority_order

properties.description: Meaning of the categorical-to-score mapping.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should explain why this input_value maps to this score
properties.business_description: Textual explanation of what this categorical value represents and why it maps to the given score.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure description is meaningful when populated
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by factor_code

properties.description: Timestamp when the metadata record was created.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Auto-populated on insert
properties.business_description: Audit timestamp tracking when the lookup mapping was first created.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate timestamp format, Check for future dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by model_code

properties.description: Maps categorical inputs to numeric scores for CSOD risk scoring factors. Key lookup factors: compliance likelihood 'course_completion_status' maps Transcript_csod.trainingStatus values ('Completed', 'In Progress', 'Assigned', 'Overdue') to scores. Compliance/attrition impact 'position_level' maps position levels ('Executive', 'Senior Management', 'Middle Management', 'Individual Contributor', 'Entry Level') to scores. Attrition likelihood 'tenure_risk_band' maps tenure bands to scores. Join on (model_code, dimension, factor_code, input_value) to get score.
properties.business_purpose: Lookup table for categorical-to-score mappings. Use when factor_metadata.scoring_type='lookup'. Transform functions should join source data categorical values to this table to retrieve numeric scores.
properties.data_lineage: Manually maintained metadata table seeded by create_csod_risk_scoring_metadata_tables.sql migration script.

properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Auto-incremented, Cannot be null

properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by factor_code

properties.business_description: Links the bucket mapping to a specific risk model.

properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by dimension, Filter by model_code and dimension
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by dimension, GROUP BY dimension

properties.description: Factor identifier matching csod_risk_factor_metadata.factor_code.

properties.business_description: Links this bucket mapping to a specific scoring factor.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate foreign key relationship with csod_risk_factor_metadata, Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by factor_code, Filter by model_code and dimension
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by factor_code, GROUP BY factor_code

properties.description: Bucket label identifier (e.g., DUE_0_7, ENG_0_20, OVERDUE_90_PLUS).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be unique within (model_code, dimension, factor_code)
properties.business_description: Human-readable identifier for this numeric range bucket, used for reporting and debugging.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate uniqueness within (model_code, dimension, factor_code), Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by bucket_code, Filter by factor_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by bucket_code, GROUP BY bucket_code

properties.description: Lower bound for the numeric bucket range.
properties.business_rules: Can be null (for unbounded lower range), Must be < max_value if both are set
properties.business_description: Lower threshold for matching numeric input values to this bucket. Use min_inclusive flag to determine if boundary is inclusive.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate min_value < max_value if both are set, Check for gaps/overlaps between buckets
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by factor_code, Filter by bucket_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MIN, MAX

properties.description: Upper bound for the numeric bucket range.
properties.business_rules: Can be null (for unbounded upper range), Must be > min_value if both are set
properties.business_description: Upper threshold for matching numeric input values to this bucket. Use max_inclusive flag to determine if boundary is inclusive.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate max_value > min_value if both are set, Check for gaps/overlaps between buckets
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by factor_code, Filter by bucket_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MIN, MAX

properties.description: Whether min_value boundary is inclusive in range matching.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Default is TRUE, TRUE means value >= min_value, FALSE means value > min_value
properties.business_description: Flag determining if input values equal to min_value are included in this bucket.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Ensure consistent boundary logic across buckets
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by factor_code

properties.description: Whether max_value boundary is inclusive in range matching.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Default is FALSE, TRUE means value <= max_value, FALSE means value < max_value
properties.business_description: Flag determining if input values equal to max_value are included in this bucket.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Ensure consistent boundary logic across buckets
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by factor_code

properties.description: Numeric score (0-100) assigned to values within this bucket range.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Numeric score assigned when source data falls within this bucket's range. Used in weighted factor calculations.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by score ranges, Filter by factor_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVG, MIN, MAX, PERCENTILE

properties.description: Bucket evaluation precedence when multiple buckets could match.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Lower number = higher priority, Used to resolve overlapping bucket ranges
properties.business_description: Numeric ordering used when multiple buckets could match an input value. Lower priority_order values are evaluated first and preferred.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate uniqueness within (model_code, dimension, factor_code) if used for tie-breaking
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by factor_code, Filter by priority_order
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MIN, MAX, ORDER BY priority_order

properties.description: Human-readable description of the bucket range and its meaning.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should explain the range and its risk implications

properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure description is meaningful when populated

properties.description: Timestamp when the metadata record was created.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Auto-populated on insert
properties.business_description: Audit timestamp tracking when the bucket mapping was first created.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate timestamp format, Check for future dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by model_code

properties.description: Defines numeric buckets (ranges) mapped to scores for CSOD risk scoring factors. Key bucket factors: compliance likelihood 'days_until_due' (overdue buckets: OVERDUE_90_PLUS, OVERDUE_60_90, OVERDUE_30_60, OVERDUE_7_30, OVERDUE_0_7; not overdue: DUE_0_7, DUE_7_14, DUE_14_30, DUE_30_PLUS), 'days_since_last_activity_start' (LAS_0_1, LAS_1_7, LAS_7_30, LAS_30_60, LAS_60_90, LAS_90_PLUS), 'days_since_assigned' (ASSIGNED_0_7, ASSIGNED_7_30, ASSIGNED_30_60, ASSIGNED_60_90, ASSIGNED_90_PLUS), 'division_completion_rate' (DCR_0_60, DCR_60_80, DCR_80_90, DCR_90_97, DCR_97_100), 'division_overdue_rate' (DOR_0_1, DOR_1_5, DOR_5_10, DOR_10_20, DOR_20_PLUS), 'division_avg_days_to_complete' (DDC_0_7, DDC_7_14, DDC_14_30, DDC_30_60, DDC_60_PLUS), 'completion_percentage', 'last_login_days' (with 30/60/90+ granularity). Attrition likelihood includes 'course_completion_rate', 'completion_percentage', 'days_since_last_activity_start', 'division_completion_rate', 'division_overdue_rate'. Use min_inclusive/max_inclusive flags for range matching. Join on (model_code, dimension, factor_code) and match input value within bucket range.
properties.business_purpose: Bucket table for numeric-to-score mappings. Use when factor_metadata.scoring_type='bucket'. Transform functions should match numeric input values to buckets using min_value/max_value with min_inclusive/max_inclusive flags. Buckets are evaluated in priority_order (1 = highest priority).
properties.data_lineage: Manually maintained metadata table seeded by create_csod_risk_scoring_metadata_tables.sql migration script.

properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by rule_type, Filter by model_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by rule_type, GROUP BY rule_type

properties.description: Human-readable description of what the rule does.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should explain the rule's purpose and trigger conditions
properties.business_description: Textual explanation of the rule's business logic and when it triggers.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure description is meaningful when populated
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by model_code, Filter by rule_code

properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by condition_type, GROUP BY condition_type

properties.description: Threshold value used by the condition to trigger the rule.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Must be appropriate for the condition_type (e.g., 0-100 for risk_gte, days for days_until_due_lt)
properties.business_description: Numeric threshold that, when met or exceeded, triggers the rule. Interpretation depends on condition_type.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range appropriate for condition_type, Check for null values when condition requires a threshold
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by condition_value ranges, Filter by condition_type
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MIN, MAX, AVG

properties.description: Flag value to emit when condition matches (e.g., 'Yes').
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Typically 'Yes' for escalation rules
properties.business_description: Value to set in output flags (e.g., managerEscalation, hrEscalation) when this rule's condition is met.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against expected flag values, Check consistency with rule_type
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by output_flag_value, Filter by rule_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by output_flag_value, GROUP BY output_flag_value

properties.description: Evaluation priority where 1 = highest priority.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Lower number = higher priority
properties.business_description: Numeric ordering for rule evaluation. Rules with lower priority_order are evaluated first.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate uniqueness within model_code if used for ordering
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by priority_order, Filter by model_code
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MIN, MAX, ORDER BY priority_order

properties.description: Whether the rule is currently active in rule evaluation.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Default is TRUE, Only active rules should be evaluated
properties.business_description: Flag indicating whether this rule should be evaluated in production. Inactive rules are excluded but retained for historical reference.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Ensure only active rules are used in production
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by is_active=TRUE for production use, Filter by model_code and is_active
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by is_active, COUNT where is_active=TRUE

properties.description: Timestamp when the metadata record was created.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Auto-populated on insert
properties.business_description: Audit timestamp tracking when the rule metadata was first created.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate timestamp format, Check for future dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by model_code

properties.description: Defines escalation triggers used by CSOD compliance and attrition risk workflows. Rule metadata for automated escalation flags.
properties.business_purpose: Enables automated escalation workflows based on risk thresholds. Compliance rules: MANAGER_ESCALATE_RISK_GTE_75 (riskScore >= 75), MANAGER_ESCALATE_DUE_LT_7 (daysUntilDue < 7). Attrition rules: HR_ESCALATE_RISK_GTE_75 (attritionRiskScore >= 75). Transform functions should evaluate conditions and set output flags accordingly.
properties.data_lineage: Manually maintained metadata table seeded by create_csod_risk_scoring_metadata_tables.sql migration script.
